Re-Engagement
Here we are going to reengage the current
following of the personality brand client which is
imperative to deploying content into the unknown.
We follow a formula of getting current active fans to engage
first, that way all prospect fans and customers can follow the
sheep effect with showing support & joining into the fan base.
Expansion
In this phase we expand the
personality’s brand awareness,
lead generation or sales campaigns
into new demographics. We start
with targeting the ideal customers
we want built into fan base &
then target them with
content from the
re-engagement
campaign.
Here we collect all data from
social media channels, blog content,
video content, etc. We analyze the
data for what worked best. We then
repeat successful actions.
Collect & Analyze
Sell / Retarget
In this critical phase we re-engaged current
audience, new audience and retarget video views
or landing pages clicks with direct sales ads
or lead generation ads. This sequence in
this phase is where we merit our
highest return for clients.
Phases Of Growth & Result
01
03
02	04 START
CHANGE
STOP
